title: Rob Atkinson
text:
Faculty directory observation
Name: Rob Atkinson
Snapshot: 2026-07-21
published_college: College of Natural and Behavioral Sciences

organizational_affiliations.label: College of Natural and Behavioral Sciences

education_entries: Ph D in Biology, Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University
MS in Biology, James Madison University
BS in Biology, James Madison University
research_interests: My students and I study the effect of water and other variables on wetland plant communities. Projects focus on wetland mitigation, Atlantic White Cedar swamps and similar concerns.
teaching_interests: I teach a class on Wetlands for non-majors, Environmental Conservation for upper level elective for biology majors, and Wetland Ecology for graduate students.
publications: Journal Article, Academic Journal (2020). Growth rates of Atlantic white cedar depend on hydrologic regimes at two time scales . Wetlands. Volume, 40. Pages, 81-91.

Journal Article, Academic Journal (2007). Influence of environment and substrate quality on root decomposition in naturally regenerating and restored Atlantic white cedar wetlands . Wetlands. Volume, 27. Issue, 1. Pages, 1-11.
awards_honors: Fellow, Virginia Academy of Science, Virginia Academy of Science. (2022)

Presentations: Robert Atkinson, Society of Wetland Scientists Annual Meeting, "Buried logs: an omitted component of peatland carbon budgets," Providence Rhode Island. (2025)

Jordan Williams, Robert Atkinson, Society of Wetland Scientists Annual Meeting, "Contrasting seasonal growth characteristics in AWC peatlands in the Mid-Atlantic region," Providence Rhode Island. (2025)
Jordan Williams, Robert Atkinson, 103rd Virginia Academy of Science Annual Meeting, "How Two Anthropogenic Threats Affect Seasonal Growth in Atlantic White Cedar," University of Virginia. (2025)

Linda Manning, Robert Atkinson, 102nd VAS Annual Meeting, "Fear to Hope: A Case Study of Communication Strategies for Advancing Collaborative Public Science Research," University of Mary Washington. (2024)

Anton Riedl, Brian Lamprecht, Robert Atkinson, The 2010 International Conference on Wireless Networks (ICWN’10), "A Wireless Data Collection and Integrity Assurance System for Wetland Monitoring Projects," Las Vegas, NV. (2010)
Grants and Sponsored Research: Robert Atkinson, Janet Steven, Linda Manning, Heather Harwell, Jessica Thompson, Gary Whiting, "Subaward, DWR Ragged Island Shoreline, NOAA's Transformational Habitat Res," Sponsored by National Oceanic and Atmospheric Agency-NMFS-HCPO-2023-2008081
